etimesWatch: Men target moving train with cow dung and coloured liquid; video sparks massive outrageA viral video shows men throwing colored liquid and cow dung at a moving train. etimesVideo: Earthquake omen or ocean myth? ‘Doomsday fish’ spotted near shore in Cabo San LucasBeachgoers in Cabo San Lucas witnessed a rare event. Two deep-sea oarfish, often called 'doomsday fish,' appeared near the shore. These creatures typically live far below the ocean's surface. Onlookers gathered, and some individuals helped push the stranded fish back into the water. This unusual sighting has sparked interest and discussion.
